name: AMCON DISTRIBUTING CO
summary: AMCON Distributing Company, incorporated in Delaware in 1986 and listed on NYSE American (DIT), operates two segments: a wholesale distribution segment serving approximately 8,500 retail outlets in 34 states with over 20,000 consumer products including cigarettes, tobacco, candy, beverages, and groceries; and a retail health food segment operating 15 stores under Chamberlins Natural Foods, Akins Natural Foods, and Earth Origins Market banners throughout the Midwest and Florida.

products.name: Cigarettes and Tobacco Products
products.description: Wholesale distribution of cigarettes and tobacco products representing ~61% of consolidated revenue in fiscal 2025.

products.name: Candy and Confectionery
products.description: Wholesale distribution of candy and other confectionery products to retail outlets.

products.name: Beverages
products.description: Wholesale distribution of beverages including private label water products.

products.name: Frozen and Refrigerated Products
products.description: Wholesale distribution of frozen and refrigerated consumer products.

products.name: Health and Beauty Care Products
products.description: Wholesale distribution of health and beauty care products to convenience and grocery stores.

products.name: Institutional Foodservice Products
products.description: Wholesale distribution of foodservice products through wholesale segment.

products.name: Private Label Products
products.description: Company-marketed private label lines including water, candy, batteries, and other products.

products.name: Natural and Organic Grocery Retail
products.description: Retail health food stores carrying over 32,000 products including produce, supplements, and personal care items.

partnerships.description: Principal supplier of cigarettes and tobacco products for wholesale distribution.
